problem id: 9c5c6401
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  00100100 -> 01011010
  00111000 -> 01101100
  00111110 -> 01100011
  10101010 -> 00000001
  00000111 -> 10001101
  01011111 -> 00010001
  10010111 -> 11100101
  11010110 -> 11000111

query: 00101101
predicted answer: 11001100
